name: golang-gopkg-eapache-go-resiliency.v1-dev
title: golang-gopkg-eapache-go-resiliency.v1-dev
description:
resiliency patterns for golang
Resiliency patterns for golang. Based in part on Hystrix, Semian,
and others. Currently implemented patterns include circuit-breaker,
semaphore, deadline/timeout, batching and retriable.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-gopkg-eapache-go-resiliency.v1-dev because resiliency patterns for golang.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-gopkg-eapache-go-resiliency.v1-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-gopkg-eapache-go-resiliency.v1-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-gopkg-eapache-go-resiliency.v1-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
